rationale: ORDI is a BRC-20 token deployed on Bitcoin via the Ordinals protocol with a hard-capped total supply of 21,000,000 tokens, all of which were minted at inception (fair-launch mint completed in March 2023). There is no emission schedule, no team allocation vesting, and no protocol mechanism to create new ORDI tokens; the circulating supply equals the max supply, making the inflation rate permanently zero.
